privileged_info_summary: All five Gutenberg text IDs are correct and verified: Pride and Prejudice (1342), Frankenstein (84), Great Expectations (1400), The Picture of Dorian Gray (174), and Heart of Darkness (219). All author names are correct: Jane Austen, Mary Shelley, Charles Dickens, Oscar Wilde, and Joseph Conrad. All content fingerprints are verified in the actual Project Gutenberg plain text files: 'truth universally acknowledged' in Pride and Prejudice, 'Frankenstein' in Frankenstein, 'Pirrip' in Great Expectations, 'Dorian' in Dorian Gray, and 'Nellie' in Heart of Darkness. The data source is Project Gutenberg, a legitimate public domain collection, not synthetic data. However, the task.json file itself is incomplete and corrupted—it ends mid-string in the description field and lacks a proper 'metadata' JSON field that other tasks in this repository contain.
